query:
SELECT p.property_id, p.name as property_name, r.room_id, r.room_number, r.room_type
FROM peppr_properties p
JOIN peppr_rooms r ON r.property_id = p.property_id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%Siam%'
ORDER BY r.room_number;
